name: CCC Intelligent Solutions Holdings Inc.
summary: PART I . Founded in 1980, CCC is a leading Software-as-a-Service (SaaS) and AI platform provider for the multi-trillion-dollar insurance economy powering operations for insurers, repairers, automakers, part suppliers, and more. CCC cloud technology connects more than 35,000 businesses digitizing mission-critical workflows, commerce, and customer experiences. A trusted leader in AI, customer experience, network and workflow management, CCC delivers technology that turns crucial moments into intel...
